title: SPF Hearing: Update on Air Force Projection Forces Aviation Programs and Capabilities
text:
CHAIRMAN OPENING STATEMENT
Purpose:
To receive testimony from the Air force on Projection Forces Aviation Programs and Capabilities before the 2026 Budget Request.
Witnesses:
Ms. Darlene Costello
Principal Deputy Assistant Secretary of the Air Force for Acquisition, Technology & Logistics
Department of the Air Force
Lieutenant General David H. Tabor
Deputy Chief of Staff for Plans and Programs
